# skills-legal

Claude Code skill suite for lawyers and legal professionals.

## Skills

### contract-scanner
Extract key terms, obligations, risks, and red flags from any contract. Produces a structured summary with risk rating, a plain-English client explanation, and negotiation points.

Triggers: review contract, scan contract, contract analysis, contract risks, read contract, analyze agreement

### research-brief
Produce a structured legal research memo on any legal issue. Identifies the legal question, applicable law framework, research roadmap (Westlaw/Lexis search terms), arguments for both sides, and IRAC outline — without hallucinating citations.

Triggers: legal research, case research, research memo, find case law, legal brief, research issue

### client-intake
Guide a structured client intake conversation and produce a professional matter summary memo — facts, preliminary legal issues, jurisdiction, statute of limitations flags, conflicts check info, and engagement letter outline.

Triggers: client intake, new client, intake form, matter summary, new matter, onboard client

### settlement-summary
Produce a structured settlement analysis memo — damages calculation (economic + non-economic), liability assessment, settlement range with math shown, trial risk/reward analysis, attorney recommendation memo, and plain-English client presentation.

Triggers: settlement summary, settlement memo, case settlement, settlement analysis, mediation prep, settlement recommendation

## Install

```bash
npm install -g @gonzih/skills-legal
```

## Disclaimer

All skills are drafting and practice management aids only — not legal advice. Attorney review is required before relying on any output.
